description: Minute fragment from a ketubba written by Yosef b. Shemuel ha-levi (ca. 1180–1210). There are other fragments of the same size and shape that might belong to the same ketubba: TS NS 320.92, TS 8.98+TS NS 338.109 (direct join), TS AS 147.42, TS NS 180.44.  AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
